MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeffrey Wehr of Brayton Purcell for plaintiff and responding party
Deborah Smith of Gordon & Reres (986.5900) for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT THE GOODYEAR TIRE & RUBBER COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant failed to shift the burden of producing evidence. Plaintiff testifies to ordering Durabla gaskets (Vol. 1 at 504-505) and defendant fails to address this. The DeMarse Declaration, Exs. K & L, is not admissible. It is hearsay, an out of state declaration that does not comply with the subscription requirements of CCP 2015.5. Plaintiff's declaration is admissible and creates a triable issue of fact. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
